text: oh so THAT is why my travel montages always look like a windows movie maker project from 2005
the secret is always in the ease handles
wait what do you mean by ease handles
if you leave your keyframes linear it looks like a robot did it
you need that subtle acceleration curve
everyone starts by overusing the zoom blur transition
don't even get me started on page turns
the real pro move is cutting on motion
if the audience doesn't notice the transition you did your job
